privileged_info_summary: This is a data center rack elevation diagram update task using Draw.io. The task involves updating a rack diagram (rack_a07.drawio) with hardware changes: removing DB-REPLICA-01, adding DB-REPLICA-02, SW-DIST-01, APP-API-01, APP-API-02, and a patch panel at specified U-positions. Required color-coding uses four standard pastel hex colors: #f8cecc for power equipment (red), #dae8fc for network devices (blue), #d5e8d4 for compute servers (green), and #ffe6cc for database servers (orange). A second page titled 'Power Budget' must be created with a power consumption table listing 8 devices with wattages ranging from 0W to 3000W. Final output must be exported as a multi-page PDF to the exports folder. All data is synthetic, generated by setup scripts with embedded XML and configuration.
